CustomField.description: When non-null, the daily SyncItem auto-purge is active (runs at 3 AM UTC via the Delivery Hub Sync scheduler). Batch-deletes ONLY StatusPk__c='Synced' ledger rows older than SyncItemRetentionDaysNumber__c (default 30 days, aged on LastModifiedDate) — Staged/Queued/Pending/Failed rows are never touched. Because it deletes subscriber data, it is OFF by default per the package DateTime-toggle convention — null disables the feature entirely; nothing runs until an admin opts in per org.
CustomField.label: Enable Sync Item Cleanup
